more like getting cleaned up together than js skinny dipping but ykwim.. you n your mentor alone n naked in water??

slow burn/possibly angsty bc this is taking place still early in the game and the two of you aren't too close yet. or rather: so'lek isn't quite ready to accept how close you really are/how much you really mean to him yet he knows that he's truly just trying to ignore/suppress his really real feelings for you

₊˙♡﹗˚ ༘ req. by: cin

i'm sorry everything is taking so long rn, boo. i kinda changed the scenario a little bit and I'm not sure if i catched the vibes you were going for, which is why the intro is kinda short rn, but I'll adjust it if you like. the title doesn't fit it too much either but i did it bc you inspired the series of skinny dipping for other characters too! lmk what you think, i'll happily adjust it all!!! much love n thank you for your patience!!

based on this art, credits to the artist!!

lmk if there's anything you'd like me to change or anything i should fix
